playbook.intent: Hand over a finished project cleanly: scope verified, contracts closed, handover docs delivered, retrospective captured, benefits-realisation report sent, team released, account warm for next engagement.
playbook.scope: Hand over a finished project cleanly: scope verified, contracts closed, handover docs delivered, retrospective captured, benefits-realisation report sent, team released, account warm for next engagement.

success-criteria.criterion: Every scope item has written accept/reject
Handover pack signed by receiving team

stage.name: Scope verification

tasks.task: Walk the scope register with the client
Sign off on each accepted deliverable
Document any scope variances + their rationale

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every scope item has a written accept/reject.

stage.name: Quality + cost reconciliation
stage.intent: Reconcile what we delivered vs what we baselined.

tasks.task: Run a final quality review
Reconcile EVM final vs baselined cost
Note the variance + cause

stage.decision-gate: Advance when both reports are signed by PM + delivery lead.

stage.name: Benefits realisation
stage.intent: Tell the client what they actually got.

tasks.task: Pull the originally promised benefits
Measure what was actually realised
Write a benefits-realisation report

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the client confirms the benefits picture.

stage.name: Contracts + procurement close

tasks.task: Close out subcontractor and vendor commitments
Confirm final invoice + payment terms
Archive contracts per retention policy

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every commercial obligation has a close status.

stage.name: Handover docs
stage.intent: Hand the running system to its new owner.

tasks.task: Build the handover pack (architecture, ops, decisions, gotchas)
Walk the pack with the receiving team
Get receiving-team sign-off

stage.decision-gate: Advance when receiving team signs the handover.

stage.name: Lessons learned
stage.intent: Capture the lessons before the team disperses.

tasks.task: Run a structured retro with the delivery team
Tag lessons as 'do more', 'do less', 'do differently'
File lessons into the org knowledge base

stage.decision-gate: Advance when at least 5 actionable lessons are captured.

stage.name: Team release + account warmth
stage.intent: Release the team and keep the door open.

tasks.task: Release team back to bench / next engagement
Send a closing note to the client sponsor
Schedule a 60-day follow-up call

stage.decision-gate: Required: a 60-day follow-up call on the calendar.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content project-closure-with-benefits-realisation-and-lessons-learned-two-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content project-closure-with-benefits-realisation-and-lessons-learned-two-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content project-closure-with-benefits-realisation-and-lessons-learned-two-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
